category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to Ethiopia.

title.en: China-to-Ethiopia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ECA / ES)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入埃塞俄比亚：ECA / ES合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入衣索比亞：ECA / ES合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Ethiopian Communications Authority (ECA) mandatory type approval under Proclamation 1148/2019, Ethiopian Standards Agency (ES) standards for EMC and electrical safety, the 220-230 V/50 Hz Type-C/F plug environment, Ethiopian authorized importer requirements, and advisory alignment with the Computer Crime Proclamation 958/2016 on cybersecurity.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）依据第1148/2019号公告的强制型式批准、埃塞俄比亚标准局（ES）电磁兼容和电气安全标准、220-230 V/50 Hz C/F型插头环境、埃塞俄比亚授权进口商要求以及第958/2016号公告网络安全合规的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與衣索比亞通訊管理局（ECA）依據第1148/2019號公告的強制型式批准、衣索比亞標準局（ES）電磁相容和電氣安全標準、220-230 V/50 Hz C/F型插頭環境、衣索比亞授權進口商要求以及第958/2016號公告網絡安全合規的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, ECA type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current ECA regulations, applicable ES standards, and Ethiopia market entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Ethiopia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、ECA型式批准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于埃塞俄比亚销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行ECA法规、适用ES标准及埃塞俄比亚市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、ECA型式批准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於衣索比亞銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行ECA法規、適用ES標準及衣索比亞市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: The main Ethiopia gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: mandatory ECA type approval under Proclamation 1148/2019 (CE, FCC, and CCC are not recognised by ECA), ES standards for EMC emissions and immunity based on CISPR frameworks, electrical safety compliance for Ethiopia's 220-230 V/50 Hz Type-C/F plug environment, appointment of a local Ethiopian authorized importer or agent, and advisory awareness of the Computer Crime Proclamation 958/2016 on cybersecurity. Ethiopia's telecom market opened in 2021 and ECA type approval enforcement is active.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入埃塞俄比亚的主要差距包括：依据第1148/2019号公告的强制性ECA型式批准（CE、FCC和CCC均不被ECA承认）、基于CISPR框架的ES电磁兼容排放和抗扰度标准、埃塞俄比亚220-230 V/50 Hz C/F型插头环境的电气安全合规、委任埃塞俄比亚本地授权进口商或代理，以及对第958/2016号公告网络安全要求的了解。埃塞俄比亚电信市场于2021年开放，ECA型式批准执法已全面启动。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入衣索比亞的主要差距包括：依據第1148/2019號公告的強制性ECA型式批准（CE、FCC和CCC均不被ECA承認）、基於CISPR框架的ES電磁相容排放和抗擾度標準、衣索比亞220-230 V/50 Hz C/F型插頭環境的電氣安全合規、委任衣索比亞本地授權進口商或代理，以及對第958/2016號公告網絡安全要求的了解。衣索比亞電信市場於2021年開放，ECA型式批准執法已全面啟動。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
